title: CLACKAMAS COUNTY COORDINATED HOUSING ACCESS - 211info
text: COMMUNITY DEVELOPMENT CLACKAMAS COUNTY COORDINATED HOUSING ACCESS Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides a centralized access point for households experiencing homelessness or a housing crisis through a collaboration of multiple agencies. Eligible households are reviewed for services and added to the Housing By Name List for all qualifying programs. Assistance with rent or moving costs is limited, not guaranteed, and may depend on factors such as urban growth boundaries, eviction notices, court dates, and funding. Eligibility: Individuals and families who are homeless or at imminent risk of becoming homeless seeking prevention/diversion services to stay in their current homes Hours: Monday-Friday 8am-6pm Off-peak call times: Monday-Thursday 4pm-6pm Email (503) 655-8575 Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Intake (503) 655-8575 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call intake hotline. Off-peak times are best. Visit website for more information. FEES: None DOCUMENTS: None required at intake. Helpful to know number of times living in shelters, street, car, or other place not meant for human habitation. LANGUAGES: English, Spanish, interpretation by arrangement AREA SERVED: Most services: Clackamas County Moving Assistance: Cities of Gladstone, Happy Valley, Lake Oswego, Milwaukie, Oregon City, Rivergrove, Tualitan, and West Linn (Clackamas County only) and zipcode 97267 (Johnson City). These are within the Urban Growth Boundary. SITE HOURS: Monday-Friday 8am-6pm TRAVEL/LOCATION INFORMATION: Located at the intersection of Kaen and Beavercreek Roads, at the top of the hill in Oregon City. On TriMet bus line 33 with sign Clackamas Community College/CCC. Services: Housing Related Coordinated Entry Housing Related Coordinated Entry * Homeless Families Housing Related Coordinated Entry * Homeless Veterans Housing Related Coordinated Entry * Veterans If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. No Mapping Information Available
